description: capital and the largest city of Somalia
description_wiki: Mogadishu, locally known as Xamar or Hamar, is the capital and most populous city of Somalia.
Somalia, officially the Federal Republic of Somalia, is the easternmost country in continental Africa.

description: country in the Horn of Africa
description_wiki: Ethiopia, officially the Federal Democratic Republic of Ethiopia, is a landlocked country located in the Horn of Africa region of East Africa.

description: country located primarily in North America
description_wiki: The United States of America (USA), also known as the United States (U.S.) or America, is a country primarily located in North America.

aliases: The City So Nice They Named It Twice
description: most populous city in the United States
description_wiki: New York, often called New York City (NYC), is the most populous city in the United States.

description: city in Potter and Randall counties in Texas, United States, that is also the seat of Potter County
description_wiki: Amarillo ( AM-ə-RIL-oh; Spanish for "yellow") is a city in the U.S. state of Texas and the county seat of Potter County, though most of the southern half of the city extends into Randall County.

description: state of the United States of America
description_wiki: Minnesota is a state in the Upper Midwestern region of the United States.
